reviews.review_description: Takes a little bit to get used to the movement, but after that it feels really good. You can move around with a lot of freedom and the combat is fun. I mostly played solo and replayed the level many times. Hope more players get on because it has a lot of potential multiplayer.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing, more levels coming in the next update!

reviews.review_description: I love the cyberpunk aesthetic and sound effects for the weapons. I played with some friends and had a blast, levels have fun obstacles to dodge and jumping around platforms feels chaotic in a good way.

developer_response.body: Thank you, more levels to have chaotic fun with friends coming soon!

reviews.review_description: This one is much more active. Lots of jumping, dashing, and swinging blades around rooftops. Feels pretty cool once you get into the flow… also a good reminder that VR can double as a workout.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and getting active with Cyberblade Battles ⚔️

reviews.review_description: I played solo and still had a lot of fun. Movement feels smooth, and battling on neon rooftops is exciting.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing! More ways to fight across the city are coming soon ⚔️

reviews.review_description: This game is great good graphics. I like the full body game looks cool.  The guns are really cool the only thing is the movement ￼￼ the shield and thrusters and are awesome and how you have to move your arms to move, but this also creates a lot of problems you run in the wall and you can’t bounce yourself off of them so then you need to like turn your whole body so I think they should add like a real tag movement or change the joystick just use the joystick regularly or add gorilla tag movement so you can bounce off walls and you could also dash with your hands when you move them like a running

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! We’re testing wall-bounce plus optional snap turn and joystick assist soon 🙌

reviews.review_title: Dear god give us joystick movement
reviews.review_description:
Every time a vr dev tries to make a new movement system their game dies and an angel rips its own wings off.
Replace whatever this jank movement is with joystick movement and move on with making a decent game already.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, and sorry to hear this. A lot of players are really enjoying the movement system, it’s designed to reward practice and skill. We know it’s not for everyone, and that’s okay. Still, appreciate you giving it a shot. That said, we’re always listening and iterating, and your input helps!

reviews.review_description: The game feel very competitive and fast phased
